occupation.evidence: Customer: Na main working hun na retired hun business hai.

occupation_detail.evidence: Customer: Na main working hun na retired hun business hai.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Aap apna aur hamara time kharab karne ki jagah jo meri requirement hai wo samjhiye.

objections.quote: Aap apna aur hamara time kharab karne ki jagah jo meri requirement hai wo samjhiye.

customer_pain_points: needs one-time investment plan with annual returns

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Like around kitne percent ka aapko minimum return chahiye hi chahiye wo to kuch hoga na aisa.

primary_goal.evidence: Customer: Meri requirement hai one time investment aur annual return.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Na main working hun na retired hun business hai.

agent_promises: 36 percent guaranteed income within a year

product_fit.mismatch_reason: The agent pitched a regular premium plan while the customer explicitly requested a one-time investment plan.
missed_opportunities: Did not immediately pivot to annuity or single premium products despite the customer's clear request.

approachability.reasoning: The customer is clear about his requirements (one-time investment, annual return) and is willing to listen if the agent can provide a relevant product.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent opened with a pitch for a guaranteed income plan, and the customer responded with a neutral 'Bataiye'.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was initially passive but became assertive, clearly stating his requirement for a one-time investment plan with annual returns.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer interrupted the agent's generic pitch to demand a product that fits his specific requirement of a one-time investment with annual returns.
call_narrative.ending: The agent agreed to check for a plan matching the customer's specific needs and promised to get back to him.

key_quotes: Meri requirement hai one time investment aur annual return.
Aap apna aur hamara time kharab karne ki jagah jo meri requirement hai wo samjhiye.
